mechanics.excerpt: In fact, they all make virtual copies of the same Star League-era rifle, the 5I-445 designed Heston, Laser Weapons The Iaser is the staple of the technologically superior army; with superior range ad powerful punch. However; lasers are expensive. placing them well out of the price range most prospective users In fact, some estimate that slug-throwers outnumber lasers in the Inner Sphere by more than 20 to (25 in tne Periphery).
